'''Bseto''' was a [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] found in the [[Bseto system/Legends|Bseto system]]. It was orbited by three planets, [[Bseto I]], [[Indikir]] and [[Sarahwiee]]. Between Indikir and Sarahwiee was the [[Lweilot Asteroid Belt]].
